things.name: Citadelle Laferriere
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Haiti's greatest monument - a mountaintop fortress built after independence

things.name: Sans-Souci Palace
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage ruined palace of King Henri Christophe - the Versailles of the Caribbean

things.name: Musee du Pantheon National Haiti (MUPANAH)
things.description: Haiti's national museum with the anchor from Columbus's Santa Maria

things.name: Iron Market (Marche en Fer)
things.description: Restored 1891 Victorian iron market - Port-au-Prince's most iconic landmark

things.name: Petion-Ville Art Galleries
things.description: Haiti's extraordinary naif painting tradition - some of the Caribbean's finest art

things.name: Labadee Private Beach (Royal Caribbean)
things.description: Beautiful north coast beach leased to Royal Caribbean ships

things.name: Holy Trinity Cathedral Murals
things.description: Earthquake-damaged cathedral with extraordinary Haitian naif murals in the remaining walls

things.name: Jacmel Carnival
things.description: Haiti's most creative carnival with papier-mache masks and traditional rara bands

things.name: Bassin Bleu Waterfall
things.description: Three-tiered swimming holes near Jacmel accessible by horseback

things.name: Griot Pork with Pikliz
things.description: Haiti's national dish - fried pork chunks with vinegary pickled vegetable relish
